title: Linear official product development positioning
claim: Linear frames itself as a system for modern product development that streamlines work from roadmap to release across planning, issue tracking, cycle planning, AI workflows, and customer requests.
source_snippet: The features page ties roadmap, build workflows, AI, insights, and customer requests into one product development system.
implication: ProductOS needs a similarly coherent item narrative, but with stronger PM-facing evidence lineage and explicit gates.
followup_questions: Which parts of Linear’s workflow remain execution-first rather than discovery-trace-first for PMs?
